title: Korbond Laundry Market, Black, 0.8mm
features: Always test Korbond laundry marker on an inconspicuous area first
Always refer to the garment care label for washing Instructions
description: Korbond laundry marker is ideal for writing names on clothes labels and other textiles around the home. The permanent marker pen has been developed to withstand continuous washing and is especially suited to labelling school uniform and gym kits.
